texto: We do not work for unity; we work to end and erase disunity. Unity is of God; disunity is of man. In matters of doctrine and practice of conscience, our guide should be this traditional saying: "In essentials, unity. In nonessentials, liberty. But in all things, love.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Mike Timmis sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “We do not work for unity; we work to end and erase disunity. Unity is of God; disunity is of man.…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a amor, christianity, god, útil em momentos de termino e trabalho.
